seo.title: AI Consulting & Development | SSW
seo.description: Custom AI & Machine Learning solutions in Sydney, Brisbane, Melbourne & Newcastle. We develop bespoke AI applications tailored to your business workflows and data requirements.

blocks.heading: Want a AI powered **chatbot** on your website?
blocks.description: Our AI-powered chatbots are redefining customer service. Delivering instant, intelligent, and personalized support 24/7.

blocks.heading: Trusted in Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, and Newcastle by
Why invest in **Chatbots** now?
blocks.description:
Previously, chatbots posed financial and technical risks due to their high costs and frequent bugs. But times have changed. Advanced AI language models, such as ChatGPT, offer reliable and effective chatbots at a fraction of the former cost - just $3,990 + GST.

Neglecting to include a robust chatbot on your website is now a missed opportunity for optimizing customer engagement.

mediaConfiguration.altText: Website Chatbot in 1 day | Ulysses Maclaren

cards.heading: Customer Support
cards.description: Get customer support that never sleeps. An AI-powered chatbot gives your customers immediate assistance, day or night – and costs less!just practical AI that solves real problems.

cards.heading: Customization
cards.description: You choose what information to train your bot with – webpages, documents, and/or direct text. The chatbot is trained on all your sources of knowledge and can be configured to stay updated by automatically re-training itself every 24 hours.

cards.heading: Customer Experience
cards.description: Our chatbots talk like real people and have expert emotional intelligence. Whether you run a small shop or a big company, our tailored bots make customer service easy and personal.

blocks.heading: Boosting Payroll Expertise with a **Custom AI Chatbot**
blocks.description: French Payroll Expert (FPE) spent too much time answering the same questions about French labor law. We built them a custom AI chatbot that delivers accurate, multilingual answers 24/7, directly from official sources.

features.heading: Instant Answers, Any Language
features.description: Clients get fast, 24/7 payroll answers in their own language. The AI uses verified French legislation, breaking down barriers.

features.heading: AI Becomes a Selling Point
features.description: The chatbot isn't just support, it's a competitive edge that helped FPE attract new clients and win more business.

blocks.heading: **YakShaver:** Our AI Agent in Action
blocks.description:
At SSW, we don't just talk about AI, we build it. YakShaver is our AI solution that automates work item creation, proving how AI can streamline repetitive dev tasks.

Beyond the typical chatbot, YakShaver shows how AI capabilities can transform development workflows.

It's the same approach we bring to your projects, practical AI that delivers real results.

mediaConfiguration.altText: YakShaver - AI to make the perfect PBI in 30 seconds

blocks.heading: Tech Wisdom from the Trenches
blocks.body: At SSW, we’ve been knee-deep in projects for years: debugging giant solutions, fixing game-stopping bugs, and staying on the cutting edge. No guesswork, just proven tips that help you build better software.

cards.heading: If you think AI is cheating, you're doing it wrong!
cards.description: AI is the tool of this generation, but are we using it responsibly? Ulysses Maclaren dives into the best practices for AI use - covering transparency, critical thinking, data privacy, and how to leverage AI to boost productivity. Learn why using AI intelligently is the key to staying ahead in your career.

cards.heading: The Year of the AI Agent: Automation to Intelligence
cards.description: Dive into the future of AI with Ulysses Maclaren in this insightful SSW User Group session! Explore the exciting shift from automation to true AI intelligence and discover what the year of the AI agent holds for developers.

cards.heading: Choosing the Right AI Model? GitHub Models Makes It Easy!
cards.description: Confused about selecting the perfect AI model? Join Isaac Lombard and Caleb Williams as they explore how GitHub Models simplifies the process! Discover the ease of finding and utilizing AI models for your projects in this quick guide.

cards.heading: Creating Multi-Language AI-Powered Apps w/ Rust, Python & Blazor
cards.description: Discover how to build AI-powered applications that speak multiple languages! Join TJ Gokken in this User Group session as he dives into the world of multi-language app development using Rust, Python, and Blazor. Learn practical techniques and best practices for creating global-ready AI solutions.

cards.heading: How to supercharge a company with AI
cards.description: Supercharge your company with AI!  🚀  See how SSW transformed their business and Tina CMS using practical AI strategies, from customer support chatbots to AI-powered product features.  Discover actionable tips to implement AI

cards.heading: Do you provide an llms.txt file to make your website LLM-friendly?
cards.description: Ever wondered how to make your website visible to AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Cursor? 🤖 Traditional SEO is all about optimizing for search engines, but in the AI era, we need to rethink our approach!

blocks.heading: Talk to Us About Your AI Project Today
blocks.description: Connect with our Account Managers to discuss how we can help.
